identity.metaphor: The Quantum Laboratory of Digital Transformation

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl tracking-tighter font-black uppercase leading-[0.9]
scale.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-mono text-primary/80

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid - Asymmetrical layouts. Never equal columns.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold tracking-wide hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(112,0,255,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-md

cards.style: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-500 group
cards.interaction: Apply a 'tracing beam' effect or glow on hover.

nav.style: fixed top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[90%] md:w-auto bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-3 z-50 flex items-center justify-between shadow-2xl

contact_form.style: bg-black/40 border border-white/10 p-8 rounded-3xl backdrop-blur-sm
contact_form.input: bg-white/5 border-white/10 rounded-xl focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary transition-all text-white placeholder:text-white/30 h-14

animations.parallax_image: Use useScroll and useTransform to move images slightly slower than scroll speed.

setup: Install '@fontsource/unbounded' and '@fontsource/manrope' if using npm packages, or use Google Fonts import.
Configure Tailwind colors to match the 'colors' object exactly.
implementation_order: 1. Setup Global Styles (Fonts, Variables, Lenis Smooth Scroll)
2. Build the 'Cinematic Hero' with heavy initial entrance animations and the abstract background.
3. Build the 'Industry Showcase' using a horizontal scroll or parallax carousel with the selected images.
4. Build 'Services' using a Bento Grid layout with hover effects (glow/tracing beam).
5. Build 'Process' section with a vertical connecting line animation.
6. Build 'Contact' with the glassmorphic form and WhatsApp integration.
critical_rules: NO WHITE BACKGROUNDS. The site must be dark mode only.
NO DEFAULT FONTS. Use Unbounded for all headings.
All interactive elements must have a hover state.
Use 'data-testid' for all buttons and inputs.
Ensure text contrast is readable on dark backgrounds (use text-gray-300 for body).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }'
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
